name: Birth Certificate
description: Official document recording the birth of a child, issued by the local municipal authority. Required for school admission, passport, and other identity proofs.
required_documents: Hospital discharge summary / proof of birth
Affidavit (if registration is delayed beyond 21 days)
eligibility: Any child born in India. Registration should ideally be done within 21 days of birth.

name: Death Certificate
description: Official document certifying the death of a person, issued by the local municipal authority. Required for legal proceedings, insurance claims, and property transfer.
required_documents: Hospital death summary / proof of death
Identity proof of the deceased (Aadhaar / Voter ID)
eligibility: Any death occurring in India must be registered within 21 days.

name: PAN Card
description: Permanent Account Number (PAN) card issued by the Income Tax Department. A 10-character alphanumeric identifier required for financial transactions, tax filing, and opening bank accounts.
required_documents: Address proof (Aadhaar / Utility bill / Bank statement)
Date of birth proof (Birth certificate / Matriculation certificate)
eligibility: Any Indian citizen, NRI, or entity (company/firm) can apply. No age restriction.

name: Aadhaar Card
description: 12-digit unique identity number issued by UIDAI to residents of India. Serves as proof of identity and address for availing government services, subsidies, and benefits.
required_documents: Proof of identity (Passport / PAN / Voter ID / Driving License)
Proof of address (Passport / Utility bill / Bank statement / Ration card)
Date of birth proof (Birth certificate / Passport)
For children under 5: parent's Aadhaar + birth certificate
eligibility: Any resident of India, including children and infants.

name: Passport
description: Travel document issued by the Ministry of External Affairs enabling international travel. Also serves as a strong identity and citizenship proof.
required_documents: Voter ID / Birth certificate for date-of-birth proof
Address proof (Aadhaar / Utility bill / Bank statement)
eligibility: Any Indian citizen. Minors require parents' documents and consent.

name: Ration Card
description: Document issued by state governments to households eligible for purchasing subsidized food grains and other essential commodities from the Public Distribution System (PDS).
required_documents: Aadhaar card of all family members
Passport-size photographs of head of family
eligibility: Indian households, categorized by income level into APL (Above Poverty Line), BPL (Below Poverty Line), and AAY (Antyodaya Anna Yojana).

name: Voter ID (EPIC)
description: Electoral Photo Identity Card issued by the Election Commission of India. Required for voting in elections and also serves as identity proof.
required_documents: Address proof (Aadhaar / Utility bill / Rent agreement)
eligibility: Indian citizens who have attained the age of 18 years.

name: Driving License
description: Official document permitting an individual to operate motor vehicles on public roads, issued by the Regional Transport Office (RTO).
required_documents: Learner's license (must be at least 30 days old)
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18+ for motor vehicles (16+ for gearless two-wheelers up to 50cc with guardian consent).

name: PM Awas Yojana (PMAY)
description: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana provides financial assistance for construction or purchase of houses for the urban and rural poor, aiming for 'Housing for All'.
eligibility: Economically Weaker Section (EWS) with annual income up to ₹3 lakh, Low Income Group (LIG) up to ₹6 lakh, and Middle Income Group (MIG) up to ₹18 lakh. Beneficiary family should not own a pucca house.

name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Income support scheme providing ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to small and marginal farmer families having combined landholding up to 2 hectares.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with cultivable landholding up to 2 hectares. Excludes institutional landholders, income-tax payers, and government employees.

name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
description: Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana provides health insurance coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization to economically vulnerable families.
eligibility: Families identified in SECC 2011 data. Covers approximately 55 crore beneficiaries (about 12 crore families). No cap on family size or age.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Government-backed savings scheme for the girl child, offering high interest rates and tax benefits. Designed to meet education and marriage expenses of the girl child.
required_documents: Birth certificate of the girl child
Identity proof of parent/guardian (Aadhaar / PAN / Passport)
Passport-size photographs of parent and child
eligibility: Parents or legal guardians of a girl child below 10 years of age. Maximum 2 accounts per family (one per girl child).

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana
description: National financial inclusion program ensuring access to financial services like bank accounts, remittance, credit, insurance, and pension for every Indian household.
required_documents: If Aadhaar not available: Voter ID / Driving License / MGNREGA card / letter from Gazetted officer with photo
eligibility: Any Indian citizen who does not have a bank account. Minors above 10 years can also open an account.

name: MGNREGA (Job Card)
description: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to rural households whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work.
required_documents: Address proof / proof of residence in the Gram Panchayat
eligibility: Adult members of rural households willing to do unskilled manual work. Must be a resident of the Gram Panchayat where application is made.

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Provides free LPG connections to women of Below Poverty Line (BPL) households, aiming to replace unclean cooking fuels and improve health of rural women.
required_documents: BPL certificate / SECC list inclusion proof
Aadhaar card (of applicant and all adult family members)
eligibility: Adult women belonging to BPL households identified under SECC 2011. No LPG connection should exist in the household in any name.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Government-backed pension scheme for unorganized sector workers, providing a guaranteed minimum pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month after the age of 60.
required_documents: Mobile number linked with bank account
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-40 years with a savings bank account. Not an income tax payer and not a member of any statutory social security scheme.
